findings.message: no CLAUDE.md or AGENTS.md at repo root — agents have no canonical entry point

remediation.summary: Add CLAUDE.md (or AGENTS.md) at the repository root describing the project, its layout, and the rules Claude Code should follow.

findings.message: repository has deployment artifacts but no RUNBOOK.md

remediation.summary: Add a RUNBOOK.md at the repository root or in docs/ describing deployment procedures, rollback steps, and on-call escalation paths.

findings.message: no spec-first artifacts found (checked JSON Schema under schemas/, OpenAPI, Protobuf, GraphQL) — agent consumers cannot discover the output contract

remediation.summary: Place a JSON Schema at schemas/output.schema.json (or similar) with a top-level $id identifying it unambiguously, and emit a schema_version field in your tool's JSON output that matches.

findings.message: no risk-tier declaration found — agents cannot distinguish high-risk paths from safe ones

remediation.summary: Add a risk-tier declaration: RISK_TIERS.md at the root, a risk_tiers block in .archfit.yaml, or a SECURITY.md that names high-risk paths.

findings.message: deployment artifacts detected but no rollback/deployment documentation (RUNBOOK.md, docs/deployment.md, etc.)

remediation.summary: Add docs/deployment.md or RUNBOOK.md documenting deploy, verify, and rollback procedures.

findings.message: CLI entrypoint detected (cmd/, bin/, or exe/) but exit codes are not documented

remediation.summary: Add docs/exit-codes.md listing every exit code the CLI can emit, the condition that causes it, and whether it is part of the stability contract.

findings.message: no CHANGELOG.md at repo root — agents cannot diff tool versions machine-readably

remediation.summary: Add CHANGELOG.md at the repository root following the Keep a Changelog format. Minimum sections: Unreleased, then versioned releases with Added / Changed / Removed subsections.

findings.message: CLI entrypoint detected (cmd/, bin/, or exe/) but no docs/adr/ directory — irreversible design decisions are not recorded for agents

remediation.summary: Create docs/adr/ and seed it with an initial ADR documenting the architecture overview. Use YAML frontmatter (id, title, status, date).

findings.message: no CI configuration detected — the repository is locally verifiable but not continuously verified

evidence.checked_for: CI platforms (GitHub Actions, GitLab CI, CircleCI, etc.)

remediation.summary: Add a CI configuration (.github/workflows/, .gitlab-ci.yml, Jenkinsfile, or similar).

findings.message: repository deploys but shows no feature-flag mechanism — changes cannot be toggled off without a full rollback

remediation.summary: Add a feature-flag library (LaunchDarkly, Unleash, OpenFeature, ConfigCat, GrowthBook, Optimizely, GoFeatureFlag) or implement a local flag system with a config-driven toggle.
